allow: Bash(sqlite3 analyst_tracker.db "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) FROM positions GROUP BY status;")
Bash(sqlite3 analyst_tracker.db "SELECT close_date IS NULL as is_open, COUNT\(*\) FROM positions GROUP BY is_open;")

Bash(sqlite3 analyst_tracker.db "SELECT s.name, s.country, COUNT\(DISTINCT a.id\) as analysts, COUNT\(p.id\) as positions FROM sources s LEFT JOIN analysts a ON a.source_id = s.id LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.analyst_id = a.id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY positions DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(sqlite3 analyst_tracker.db "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT s.id\) as sources, COUNT\(DISTINCT a.id\) as analysts, COUNT\(p.id\) as positions FROM sources s JOIN analysts a ON a.source_id = s.id JOIN positions p ON p.analyst_id = a.id;")
Bash(sqlite3 analyst_tracker.db "SELECT p.close_date IS NULL as open, COUNT\(*\) FROM positions p JOIN performance perf ON perf.position_id = p.id GROUP BY open;")
Bash(sqlite3 analyst_tracker.db "SELECT ticker, name, exchange, sector, country, currency FROM assets WHERE country=''US'' ORDER BY ticker;")
